patterns.name: Role Contract
patterns.use_when: Defining or revising an agent role.
patterns.template: You are {role}. Mission: {mission}. Inputs: {inputs}. Outputs: {outputs}. You may use: {tools}. You must not: {safety_limits}.
patterns.source_attribution: Adapted from public prompt engineering role-prompting patterns.

patterns.name: Spec To Plan
patterns.use_when: Turning a user goal or spec into implementation steps.
patterns.template: Given spec {spec}, produce a plan with affected systems, write scope, dependencies, validation, risks, and rollback.

patterns.name: Critique Gate
patterns.use_when: Before merging, pushing, or marking work complete.
patterns.template: Review {artifact} against {requirements}. Return blockers, warnings, evidence, and exact fixes.
patterns.source_attribution: Adapted from self-check and critique prompting patterns.

patterns.name: Profitability Scenario
patterns.use_when: Evaluating ethical server monetization and sustainability options.
patterns.template: Using metrics {metrics}, model base/upside/downside scenarios. Do not recommend pay-to-win mechanics. Include assumptions, risks, and validation data needed.
patterns.source_attribution: Daedalus-native adaptation of analyst workflow patterns.
